are_you_ok.title: Denver hits 100-degree mark for first time in 2026
are_you_ok.summary: Denver hits 100 for first time in 2026 after 10 straight 90-degree days — diffuse heat effect over the metro, a genuine check-in on how people are coping.
are_you_ok.description: We've also been mired in a string of 90-degree days recently, hitting the mark 10 consecutive days.

conversation_starters.title: Airline to cut Denver flights to Ireland
conversation_starters.summary: Aer Lingus ending nonstop Dublin-Denver flights, cutting 500 jobs and 6% capacity — metro-prominent employer/airport news, widely noticed. You could open with: 'Did you catch that Aer Lingus is dropping the Denver-Dublin route?'
conversation_starters.description: Aer Lingus will end its nonstop flights from Dublin to Denver on Sept. 28 as part of a broader cut, impacting 500 jobs and reducing flight capacity by 6%.

conversation_starters.title: Arizona man arrested for "surfing" naked on locomotive in Colorado
conversation_starters.summary: Quirky, harmless, novel local oddity — prime light conversation starter. You could open with: 'Did you see the guy who got arrested for surfing a train naked in Julesburg?'
conversation_starters.description: A naked 37-year-old man was provided an orange jumpsuit and jailed last week after he was spotted on top of a Union Pacific locomotive in Julesburg.

conversation_starters.title: RTD to replace A Line rail service with bus shuttles Saturday
conversation_starters.summary: RTD replacing A Line rail with bus shuttles Saturday for maintenance — a single, bounded transit/commute change affecting DIA travelers; work-safe and locally useful. You could open with: 'Heads up if you're flying Saturday — the A Line's running bus shuttles for maintenance.'
conversation_starters.description: Commuters traveling to and from Denver International Airport on Saturday should plan for extra time as bus shuttles replace rail service for maintenance.

you_should_know.title: Neighbors push for accountability, transparency from Broomfield Police following shooting death of man in June
you_should_know.summary: Neighbors pressing Broomfield PD for accountability after a June police shooting death — police-accountability dispute landing in-metro; unsafe opener, awareness context. You-should-know.
you_should_know.description: Neighbors identified the victim as Morris Selden, describing him as a giant teddy bear who was beloved in their neighborhood.

you_should_know.title: As Boulder’s power grid falters, Xcel begins major undergrounding projects
you_should_know.summary: Xcel starting undergrounding projects amid a faltering Boulder grid to cut outages/wildfire risk — infrastructure affecting reliability in-metro; awareness context rather than a check-in or opener. Borderline; keep as you-should-know.
you_should_know.description:
Xcel is moving forward with projects along U.S. 36 and 75th Street while Boulder develops a broader strategy to reduce outages and wildfire risk.

The post As Boulder’s power grid falters, Xcel begins major undergrounding projects appeared first on The Boulder Reporting Lab.

you_should_know.title: Feds indict nearly 100 alleged members of TdA gang for hacking bank ATMs nationwide, including Colorado
you_should_know.summary: Federal indictment of ~100 alleged TdA gang members for ATM hacking nationwide, including Colorado — a systemic financial-crime outcome touching CO banks; awareness context, but a bounded set of specific defendants, not a personal check-in. You-should-know.
you_should_know.description: The U.S. Department of Justice says a violent Venezuelan gang is responsible for stealing more than $6 million from American banks across the country.
